article.title: Credit unions managing $25B in assets join stablecoin infrastructure program
article.summary: A new pilot from Stablecore, Circuit and Curql gives participating US credit unions access to test stablecoin payments and other digital asset services.

headline: Binance Drops MiCA Bid in Greece Abruptly

article.title: Binance withdraws Greece-filed MiCA application
article.summary: Binance said it plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction just days ahead of the July 1 MiCA deadline, as unlicensed crypto firms are expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

headline: Wendy's Surges 42% on Social Media Frenzy

article.title: Wendy’s Soars 42% Following Viral Reddit Post
article.summary: The meme-stock crowd is rallying behind another beaten up American icon — Wendy’s Co., the fast-food chain known for the Frosty, Dave’s Triple burger and the Biggie Deal.

headline: Sunrun Soars 33% on Tesla Supply Pact

article.title: Sunrun Surges Over 30% on Tesla Deal to Supply Power for AI
article.summary: Sunrun Inc.’s stock jumped as much as 31% after the home solar provider announced it will partner with Tesla Inc. and Renew Home to provide power for data centers and utilities across the US.

headline: AI Stock Surges 20% on Custom Chip Launch

headline: Trump Blocks $1B Housing Bill With CBDC Ban

article.title: Trump Cancels Signing of Bipartisan Housing Bill Containing CBDC Ban: 'Of Minor Importance'

headline: Onyx Odds Raises $20M from Payward-Led Funding Round

article.summary: The app will face stiff competition in the prediction markets space, competing with dominant market leaders Kalshi and Polymarket.

headline: Polymarket Volume Surges 300% Amid World Cup Frenzy

article.title: World Cup boom sends Polymarket volume up 300% while Kalshi sets open interest records
article.summary: Kalshi's aggregated OI reached a record $1.16 billion last week, the first time the platform’s OI surpassed the billion-dollar mark.

headline: NKorea Succession Risks Spark $10B Market Plunge
